query: I'm redesigning a fintech SaaS dashboard for ops managers. I need a design system, color palette, typography pairing, chart guidance, and UX risks called out before we start coding in React.
Can you propose a landing page direction for a healthcare service? I care about accessibility, strong light mode contrast, trustworthy colors, and what patterns to avoid.
Review this dashboard direction like a hostile design lead: is it professional enough for enterprise buyers, are the interactions trustworthy, and what would you change before implementation?
I need a reusable design system for a B2B admin app, then page-specific guidance for the billing screen. Give me the visual direction and how the page override should differ from the master rules.
Help me choose typography, icon style, and a color direction for a mental health mobile app. I need something calm, readable, and accessible, not trendy nonsense.
We're shipping a Tailwind marketing site for a security product. I want a landing page structure, CTA placement, trust signals, and anti-patterns that would make it look amateur.
Pick the right chart types and dashboard visual treatment for a real-time logistics control panel. I need practical UI advice, not just data-viz theory.
Before we build this shadcn dashboard, recommend a design direction that balances dense data, accessibility, and clean hover states. Include what visual shortcuts to avoid.
I'm not asking for code yet. I need a UI critique of this e-commerce homepage direction: layout hierarchy, conversion friction, typography tone, and whether the palette supports trust.
Design-wise, what should a SwiftUI finance app use for color hierarchy, typography mood, and interaction polish if we want it to feel premium but not flashy?
The Tailwind build is dropping classes in production. Find the purge/config issue and fix the CSS bug.
Turn this Figma frame into a pixel-perfect React component. I already know the design; I just need the implementation code.
Use Playwright to reproduce a flaky modal bug and record a video of the failure. I care about the browser trace, not design recommendations.
My CSS grid collapses on mobile Safari. Debug the layout bug and explain the browser quirk.
Wire up a Next.js dashboard route with server components and fix the data fetching waterfall. Don't change the visual design.
I need a DRF endpoint for analytics cards on a dashboard. Focus on serializers, permissions, and response shape.
Write a prompt I can paste into Midjourney for a neon cyberpunk landing page illustration.
Set up Storybook and snapshot tests for our component library. We already have the design tokens; this is tooling work.
This React form rerenders too much when typing. Profile it and fix the memoization issue.
Implement keyboard navigation and ARIA labels for this existing modal component without changing its visual system.
